c.f: IF( IF( Type_of_goods_filled_1, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class1_Split + IF( Type_of_goods_filled_2, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class2_Split + IF( Type_of_goods_filled_3, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class3_Split <>100%, "Type of goods split is currently " &TEXT( IF( Type_of_goods_filled_1, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class1_Split + IF( Type_of_goods_filled_2, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class2_Split + IF( Type_of_goods_filled_3, 1, 0) * \selected_typeofgoods_Class3_Split, "0%")&" It must add up to 100%. Please check!","")
IF(SUM(C26:C29)<>100%,"Transportation type split is currently " &TEXT(SUM(C26:C29),"0%")&" It must add up to 100%. Please check!","")

c.v: Attention! The detailed Geographical Scope currently does not add up to 100%. It currently only adds up to 0%!

dataValidation.prompt: Required for reporting purposes. Turnover of subsidiaries should be included in overall turnover, hence, no additional risk exposure expected.
Please enter the maximum number of days for storage in the ordinary course of transit.

dataValidation.error: Please enter an UWWB-ID in the format MA-1234567.
Please enter a Partner ID in the format P-123-123-123-1.
dataValidation.formula1: AND( LEFT(C4, 2) = "P-", MID(C4, 6, 1) = "-", MID(C4, 10, 1) = "-", MID(C4, 14, 1) = "-", IF( ISNUMBER( _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 3, 3) )), _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 3, 3) ) > 0 ), IF( ISNUMBER( _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 7, 3) )), _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 7, 3) ) > 0 ), IF( ISNUMBER( _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 11, 3) )), _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( MID(C4, 11, 3) ) > 0 ), ISNUMBER( _xlfn.NUMBERVALUE( RIGHT(C4, 1) )) )

dataValidation.error: The discount/surcharge has to be input as a number (e.g. -20%).
Please enter a number larger or equal to 0.
